summary: Codex (structured/json) recovers from a MID-STREAM bridge tool failure: first call fails, model retries, turn completes with the build id

agent_review.notes: Codex structured/json recovers from a mid-stream bridge tool failure: handler failed call #1, model retried (tool_handler_calls=2), stream stayed alive, turn completed with the correct build id (obtainable only via a successful tool run).
